cardano-ledger-test-9.9.9.9: Testing harness, tests and benchmarks for Shelley style cardano ledgers
  • Source
  • Contents
  • Index
Safe HaskellSafe-Inferred
LanguageHaskell2010

Test.Cardano.Ledger.Constrained.V2.Conway

Contents

  • Orphan instances

Description

This module provides the necessary instances of HasSpec and HasSimpleRep to write specs for the environments, states, and signals in the conway STS rules.

Documentation

type ConwayUnivFns = StringFn ': (RoseTreeFn ': BaseFns) Source #

type ConwayFn = Fix (OneofL ConwayUnivFns) Source #

type IsConwayUniv fn = (BaseUniverse fn, Member (StringFn fn) fn, Member (MapFn fn) fn, Member (FunFn fn) fn, Member (RoseTreeFn fn) fn) Source #

type ConwayTxBodyTypes c = '[Set (TxIn (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), Set (TxIn (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), Set (TxIn (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), StrictSeq (Sized (TxOut (ConwayEra c))), StrictMaybe (Sized (TxOut (ConwayEra c))), StrictMaybe Coin, OSet (ConwayTxCert (ConwayEra c)), Withdrawals (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c)), Coin, ValidityInterval, Set (KeyHash 'Witness (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), MultiAsset (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c)), StrictMaybe (ScriptIntegrityHash (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), StrictMaybe (AuxiliaryDataHash (EraCrypto (ConwayEra c))), StrictMaybe Network, VotingProcedures (ConwayEra c), OSet (ProposalProcedure (ConwayEra c)), StrictMaybe Coin, Coin] Source #

cSNothing_ ∷ HasSpec fn a ⇒ Term fn (StrictMaybe a) Source #

cSJust_ ∷ HasSpec fn a ⇒ Term fn a → Term fn (StrictMaybe a) Source #

type BabbageTxOutTypes era = '[Addr (EraCrypto era), Value era, Datum era, StrictMaybe (Script era)] Source #

cKeyHashObj ∷ (IsConwayUniv fn, Typeable r, Crypto c) ⇒ Term fn (KeyHash r c) → Term fn (Credential r c) Source #

cScriptHashObj ∷ (IsConwayUniv fn, Typeable r, Crypto c) ⇒ Term fn (ScriptHash c) → Term fn (Credential r c) Source #

type ProposalTree = (StrictMaybe (GovActionId StandardCrypto), [RoseTree GAS]) Source #

type ProposalsType = '[ProposalTree, ProposalTree, ProposalTree, ProposalTree, [GAS]] Source #
